LA County Public Health - Maternal, Child, & Adolescent Health

Community Health Outreach Initiatives (CHOI)
About Community Health Outreach Initiatives (CHOI)
CHOI works with community groups, cities, schools, and clinics to help people sign up for FREE and/or very low-cost health insurance. We also connect families to programs that provide food, housing, mental health support, legal help, and other important services.
Find a CHOI Provider in
								Your Area
Use the search tool below to find CHOI providers in your area. Search by ZIP Code or
								City to quickly locate a provider and view contact information and directions.

Program Data & Outcomes
Program Impact
Many children and families in Los Angeles County have a hard time getting the health
									care they need.
									Since 2003,
CHOI has helped more than 1.5 million people
get health
									coverage and use it.
									Every year, CHOI supports thousands of families in applying for, keeping, and using
									their health insurance.
Research Evidence
A
study
of the CHOI program
									in Los Angeles found that people who worked with CHOI were more likely to have a
									regular doctor’s office and less likely to face problems like not having insurance,
									not having enough money, or not having a way to travel to appointments.
Helpful Resources
Enrollment & Coverage Help
Quick access to a variety of helpful tools that allow you to apply for services,
										locate assistance and support resources, explore available programs, and easily
										manage your coverage and benefits.
CHOI
												Program Flier:
The CHOI Program Flier provides a quick overview of the program’s
												services, eligibility, and benefits, making it easy for providers to
												share program information with patients and community partners.
Getting Enrolled
Quick access to tools and resources that help you apply for services, explore
										available programs, and manage your coverage during the enrollment process.
DHCS Medi-Cal Enrollment:
The DHCS Medi-Cal Enrollment resource helps individuals understand
												eligibility and provides guidance on how to apply for Medi-Cal coverage
												and related services.
BenefitsCal:
BenefitsCal allows users to apply for and manage public assistance
												programs like Medi-Cal, CalFresh, and CalWORKs in one easy-to-use online
												system.
Kaiser Community Health
												Program:
If your income is too high for Medi-Cal but you are still having trouble
												affording health coverage, Kaiser’s Community Health Program may be
												right for you.
Contractor Resources
Contractor Forms & Reporting
Quick access to tools and resources that help you apply for services, explore
										available programs, and manage your coverage during the enrollment process.
Contact a CHOI Provider
Have a question or need more information? Send us a message. Our team will
										review your inquiry and respond as soon as possible. We appreciate your interest
										and look forward to assisting you.
